channel.title: JavaScript Weekly
channel.description: A newsletter of JavaScript articles, news and cool projects

item.title: 【TypeScript 6.0, Next.js 16.2, and a new Node.js runtime】TypeScript 6.0、Next.js 16.2 和新的 Node.js 运行时
item.description:
【

#​778 — March 24, 2026

Read on the Web

JavaScript Weekly

Announcing TypeScript 6.0 — Over six months in the making, TypeScript 6.0 is designed to bridge the gap between its self-hosted compiler and the (almost ready) Go-powered native compiler of TypeScript 7.0 . There are new features (Temporal improvements, RegExp.escape, and more), but most important are the changes to help you prepare for 7.0:

  • Numerous default changes: strict is now true, module is esnext, rootDir defaults to ., and more.
  • A change that will affect many apps is types defaulting to [] rather than pulling in everything from node_modules/@types.
  • Numerous deprecations: the es5 target, emitting AMD, UMD, and SystemJS modules, --baseUrl, and others.
  • --stableTypeOrdering makes 6.0's type ordering behavior match 7.0's to help diagnose inference differences as you update.

Daniel Rosenwasser (Microsoft)

Add Excel-like Spreadsheet Functionality to Your JavaScript Apps — SpreadJS is the industry-leading JavaScript spreadsheet for adding advanced spreadsheet features to your enterprise apps. Build finance, analysis, budget, and other apps. Excel I/O, 500+ calc functions, tables, charts, and more. View demos now.

SpreadJS from MESCIUS inc sponsor

IN BRIEF:

  • 🤖 The Node.js community is wrestling with the role that LLM-produced code should play in its implementation, with the once creator of the io.js fork starting a petition to say 'no' to contributions built with AI assistance.

  • A large number of Deno employees announced (e.g.) they were departing the company last week. Deno employee Josh Collinsworth, not speaking for the company, noted "Deno is not going away. These are just hard times."

  • 📗 Chibivue is a code project and associated online book that provides, and explains how to build for yourself, a minimal Vue.js implementation.

RELEASES:

  • Next.js 16.2 – The React framework gets much faster next dev startup and ~50% faster rendering.

  • Storybook 10.3.0 – The component workshop adds Vite 8, Next.js 16.2, and ESLint 10 support, plus a preview of an MCP server for React dev.

  • ⚠️ All maintained Node.js versions are due security releases later today to address nine vulnerabilities.

  • Deno 2.7.6 – deno eval auto-detects CJS vs ESM, and --cpu-prof-flamegraph generates interactive SVG flamegraphs.

  • Bun 1.3.11, Valibot 1.3, ESLint 10.1

📖  Articles and Videos

The Three Pillars of JavaScript Bloat — Three reasons your node_modules is huge: needless ES3-era compat packages, micro-libraries with a single consumer, and ponyfills for APIs that shipped years ago! James, known for the e18e ecosystem performance project, offers some ways to calm the chaos.

James Garbutt

How Rewriting a Rust and WASM-Powered Parser in TypeScript Made it Faster — A counterintuitive result on the surface, but the WASM-JS boundary can introduce a serious performance penalty for many use cases, such that it can be 2-4x quicker to stay in the JS world.

Thesys Engineering Team

Clerk Auth for Chrome Extensions — Now in Vanilla JS — The Chrome Extension SDK now supports vanilla JS via createClerkClient(). Build popups and side panels without React. New quickstart included.

Clerk sponsor

📊 A React SSR Framework Performance Showdown — A large benchmark of TanStack Start, React Router, and Next.js under heavy load. The results led to patches benefitting both TanStack and React generally.

Matteo Collina (Platformatic)

Two React Design Choices Developers Don’t Like, But Can’t Avoid — Deferred state commits and dependency arrays on effects cause a lot of issues, but Ryan points out that signal-based alternatives (like Solid) only avoid them by staying synchronous.

Ryan Carniato

📄 JavaScript Thinks Everything's a Date – This is why we celebrate the progress of the Temporal API! Robert Gambee

📄 An Introductory Guide to Bookmarklets – Tiny bits of JavaScript saved in, and triggered by, bookmarks. Declan Chidlow

📺 How to Burn $30M on a JavaScript Framework – A five-minute retrospective of 2012’s famo.us project. Fireship

📄 Node.js Worker Threads are Problematic, But They Work Great for Us Aaron Harper (Inngest)

🛠 Code & Tools

pnpm 11 Beta 0: A Sneak Peek — The efficiency-focused npm alternative continues its outsized impact on JS package management. It's moving to a SQLite-powered store, gets a configuration overhaul, and has stricter build security by default. Four new commands, too, including pnpm sbom for generating Software Bill of Materials JSON documents.

pnpm contributors

Edge.js: Running Node Apps Inside a WebAssembly Sandbox — A new, in-alpha runtime that maintains full Node compatibility while offering isolation via WebAssembly. Existing apps/modules run unmodified with system calls sandboxed, and the JS engine used is pluggable (between V8, JavaScriptCore and QuickJS). More info on the homepage.

Syrus Akbary (Wasmer)

Breakpoints and console.log Is the Past, Time Travel Is the Future — 15x faster JavaScript debugging than with breakpoints and console.log, supports Vitest, Jest, Karma, Jasmine, and more.

Wallaby Team sponsor

ArrowJS 1.0: Fast, Reactive UI Runtime Built on Platform Primitives — Built around ES modules, template literals and the DOM, it can also isolate component logic inside WASM sandboxes while rendering full inline DOM directly. First unveiled in 2022 by the creator of FormKit, it's now clearly finding its feet.

Justin Schroeder

Sugar High 1.0: A Lightweight JSX Syntax Highlighter — Doesn’t need React present, so you can use it for syntax highlighting JSX snippets anywhere. You can also theme it with CSS. GitHub repo.

Jiachi Liu

  • htmlparser2 12.0 – Fast, forgiving HTML and XML parser focused on performance. Works both server-side and in the browser.

  • 🔊 vue-audio-visual 3.1 – Vue 3 HTML5 audio visualization components using the Web Audio API. Check out the demos.

  • Svelte SEO 2.1 – Optimize Svelte apps for search engines/social media with meta tags, Open Graph, and JSON-LD.

  • pnpm/action-setup 5.0 – GitHub Action to install and configure pnpm. Now uses Node.js v24.

  • ☎︎ vue-tel-input v9.8.0 – Vue component for global phone number input. (Demo.)

  • Mediabunny 1.40.0 – Powerful toolkit for reading/writing/converting media files.

  • 🗓️ EventCalendar 5.5 – Full-sized drag and drop event calendar.

  • Maz UI 4.9 – Lightweight UI components for Vue 3 and Nuxt 3.

  • React Joyride 3.0 – Create guided tours in React apps.

📰 Classifieds

Flaky tests slowing down dev? Meticulous gives engineers confidence to ship faster by autonomously testing every edge case of your web app.

📢  Elsewhere in the ecosystem

  • The Microsoft Visual Studio Code team shares how they use AI to work on VS Code, from organizing their work and handling issues, to pushing out new releases. If you've noticed VS Code is getting a release every week now, this is why!

  • 🔒 Perhaps more than ever, it's essential to ensure no secrets have sneaked into your repos. Secretlint is a linter dedicated to that task.

  • Back in 1989, Rob Pike, famous for his work on both the Go programming language and co-creating UTF-8, wrote Rob Pike's 5 Rules of Programming which has gone viral this week and still apply in 2026!

  • 🤖 Addy Osmani introduces us to comprehension debt. In a world of agent-produced code, the question is now not “how do we generate more code?” but “how do we actually understand more of what we’re shipping?”

  •  Dislike all the menu icons that macOS 26 (Tahoe) has introduced? There's a solution: defaults write -g NSMenuEnableActionImages -bool NO

】<表格边框= 0 cellpadding = 0 cellspacing = 0 对齐=“中心”边框=“0”>
<表格边框=0 cellpadding=0 cellspacing=0 边框=0 cellpadding=0 cellspacing=0>

#​778 — 2026 年 3 月 24 日

阅读网页

JavaScript 周刊

宣布 TypeScript 6.0 — TypeScript 6.0 经过六个月的开发，旨在弥合自托管编译器和（几乎准备就绪）由 Go 驱动的 TypeScript 7.0 原生编译器 .有新功能（时间改进、RegExp.escape 等），但最重要的是帮助您为 7.0 做好准备的更改：

  • 大量默认更改：strict 现在为 true，module 是 esnext，rootDir 默认为 . 等等。
  • 将影响许多应用的一个更改是 types 默认为 []，而不是从 node_modules/@types 提取所有内容。
  • 大量弃用：es5 目标、发射 AMD、UMD 和 SystemJS 模块、 ">--baseUrl 等。
  • --stableTypeOrdering 使 6.0 的类型排序行为与 7.0 匹配，以帮助您在更新时诊断推理差异。

丹尼尔·罗森瓦瑟（微软）

向您的 JavaScript 应用添加类似 Excel 的电子表格功能 — SpreadJS是业界领先的 JavaScript 电子表格，用于向您的企业应用程序添加高级电子表格功能。构建财务、分析、预算和其他应用程序。 Excel I/O、500 多个计算函数、表格、图表等。 立即查看演示。

SpreadJS 来自 MESCIUS inc 赞助商

简介：

  • 🤖 Node.js 社区正在努力解决 LLM 生成的代码在其实现中应扮演的角色，io.js 分支的曾经创建者开始请愿，对人工智能构建的贡献说“不”援助。

  • 大量Deno 员工上周宣布（例如）他们将离开公司。Deno 员工 Josh Collinsworth，不代表公司发言，注意到 “Deno 不会消失。这些只是艰难的时期。”

  • 📗Chibivue 是一个代码项目和相关的在线书籍，它提供并解释了如何为您自己构建一个最小的 Vue.js 实现。

发布：

  • Next.js 16.2 – React 框架的 next dev 启动速度更快，渲染速度加快约 50%。

  • Storybook 10.3.0 – 组件研讨会添加了 Vite 8、Next.js 16.2 和 ESLint 10 支持，以及用于 React 开发的 MCP 服务器预览。

  • ⚠️ 所有维护的 Node.js 版本 Deno 2.7.6 – deno eval 自动检测 CJS 与 ESM，并且 --cpu-prof-flamegraph 生成交互式 SVG 火焰图。

  • 小圆面包 1.3.11，Valibot 1.3，ESLint 10.1

📖 文章和视频

<表格边框=0 cellpadding=0 cellspacing=0 border=0 cellpadding=0 cellspacing=0>

JavaScript 膨胀的三大支柱 — node_modules 庞大的三个原因：不必要的 ES3 时代兼容包、单个消费者的微型库以及 ponyfills 用于多年前发布的 API！James，以 e18e 生态系统绩效项目提供了一些平息混乱的方法。

詹姆斯·加布特

如何在 TypeScript 中重写 Rust 和 WASM 支持的解析器使其更快 — 表面上这是违反直觉的结果，但 WASM-JS 边界可能会给许多用例带来严重的性能损失，因此在 JS 世界中的速度可能会快 2-4 倍。

Thesys 工程团队

Chrome 扩展程序的 Clerk Auth - 现在使用 Vanilla JS - Chrome 扩展 SDK 现在通过 createClerkClient() 支持 vanilla JS。无需 React 即可构建弹出窗口和侧面板。包含新的快速入门。

文员赞助商

📊 React SSR 框架性能对决 - TanStack Start、React Router 和 Next.js 在重负载下的大型基准测试。结果导致了总体上使 TanStack 和 React 受益的补丁。

Matteo Collina（平台）

开发人员不喜欢但无法避免的两种 React 设计选择 - 延迟状态提交和效果上的依赖数组会导致很多问题，但 Ryan 指出基于信号的替代方案（如 Solid）只能通过保持同步来避免这些问题。

瑞安·卡尼亚托

<表格边框=0 cellpadding=0 cellspacing=0 border=0 cellpadding=0 cellspacing=0>

📄JavaScript 认为一切都是日期 - 这就是我们庆祝 Temporal API 进步的原因！Robert Gambee

📄书签小工具入门指南 - 保存在书签中并由书签触发的 JavaScript 微小片段。Declan Chidlow

📺 如何在 JavaScript 框架上烧掉 3000 万美元 - 2012 年 famo.us 项目的五分钟回顾。Fireship

📄Node.js 工作线程存在问题，但它们对我们来说非常有用 Aaron Harper (Inngest)

🛠 代码和工具

pnpm 11 Beta 0：先睹为快 — 注重效率的 npm 替代方案继续对 JS 包管理产生巨大影响。它正在迁移到 SQLite 支持的存储，进行配置检修，并且默认情况下具有更严格的构建安全性。还有四个新命令，包括用于生成软件物料清单 JSON 文档的 pnpm sbom。

pnpm 贡献者

Edge.js：在 WebAssembly 沙箱内运行节点应用 — A新的 alpha 运行时可保持完全的 Node 兼容性，同时通过 WebAssembly 提供隔离。现有的应用程序/模块无需修改即可运行，系统调用沙箱化，并且使用的 JS 引擎是可插入的（在 V8、JavaScriptCore 和 QuickJS 之间）。 主页上有更多信息。

赛勒斯·阿克巴里（瓦斯默）

断点和 console.log 已成为过去，时间旅行已成为过去未来 - JavaScript 调试速度比断点和 console.log 快 15 倍，支持 Vitest、Jest、Karma、Jasmine 等。

小袋鼠团队 sp恩索尔

ArrowJS 1.0：基于平台构建的快速、反应式 UI 运行时基元 - 围绕 ES 模块、模板文字和 DOM 构建，它还可以隔离 WASM 沙箱内的组件逻辑，同时直接渲染完整的内联 DOM。 FormKit 的创建者于 2022 年首次推出，现在显然已经站稳了脚跟。

贾斯汀·施罗德

Sugar High 1.0：轻量级 JSX 语法荧光笔 - 不需要 React，因此您可以在任何地方使用它来语法突出显示 JSX 片段。您还可以使用 CSS 为其设置主题。 GitHub 存储库。

刘嘉墀

  • htmlparser2 12.0 – 快速、宽容的 HTML 和 XML 解析器，专注于性能。可在服务器端和浏览器中运行。

  • 🔊 vue-audio-visual 3.1 – 使用 Web Audio API 的 Vue 3 HTML5 音频可视化组件。查看演示。

  • Svelte SEO 2.1 – 使用元标记、Open Graph 和 JSON-LD 为搜索引擎/社交媒体优化 Svelte 应用。

  • pnpm/action-setup 5.0 – 用于安装和配置的 GitHub Action pnpm。现在使用 Node.js v24。

  • ☎︎vue-tel-input v9.8.0 – 用于全球电话号码输入的 Vue 组件。(演示。)

  • Mediabunny 1.40.0 – 用于读取/写入/转换媒体文件的强大工具包。

  • 🗓️ EventCalendar 5.5 – 全尺寸拖放活动日历。

  • Maz UI 4.9 – 适用于 Vue 3 和 Nuxt 3 的轻量级 UI 组件。

  • React Joyride 3.0 – 在 React 应用中创建导游。

📰 分类广告

不稳定的测试会减慢开发速度？ 细致让工程师有信心通过自主测试网络应用程序的每个边缘情况来更快地交付。

📢 生态系统中的其他地方

  • Microsoft Visual Studio Code 团队分享他们如何使用 AI 处理 VS Code，从组织工作和处理问题到推出新版本。如果您注意到 VS Code 现在每周都会发布一个版本，这就是原因！

  • 🔒 也许比以往任何时候都更需要确保没有秘密潜入您的存储库中。 Secretlint 是专门用于该任务的 linter。

  • 早在 1989 年，Rob Pike 因在 Go 编程语言和共同创建 UTF-8 方面的工作而闻名，他撰写了Rob Pike 的 5 条编程规则，该书本周迅速走红，至今仍然适用2026 年！

  • 🤖 Addy Osmani 向我们介绍了理解债。在代理生成代码的世界中，现在的问题不是“我们如何生成更多代码？”，而是“我们如何真正了解更多我们正在交付的内容？”

  •  不喜欢 macOS 26 (Tahoe) 引入的所有菜单图标？ 有一个解决方案：defaults write -g NSMenuEnableActionImages -bool NO

item.title: 【It’s about time: Temporal advances, Vite accelerates】是时候了：时间进步，Vite加速
item.description:
【

#​777 — March 17, 2026

Read on the Web

JavaScript Weekly

Temporal: The 9-Year Journey to Fix Time in JavaScript — JavaScript’s date/time handling is notoriously messy and libraries like Moment.js became popular as a way to work around it. In 2017, Maggie Johnson-Pint, a maintainer of Moment.js, proposed the Temporal API to fix date/time handling for good, and we’re mostly there (support is growing, with Safari and Node to catch up).

Jason Williams (Bloomberg)

Still Writing Tests Manually? Meticulous AI Is Here — Notion, Dropbox, Wiz and LaunchDarkly now use a testing paradigm they can’t work without. Built by former Palantir engineers, Meticulous automatically creates an evolving suite of E2E UI tests, delivering exhaustive coverage with no developer effort.

Meticulous sponsor

Vite 8.0 Released — A mega release for the popular build tool. Designed to be a smooth upgrade, there’s a lot behind the scenes: @vitejs/plugin-react v6 no longer needs Babel, Rolldown replaces Rollup and esbuild, Wasm SSR support, browser console forwarding to the terminal, and big performance gains.

Vite

💡 VoidZero has also open sourced its Vite+ toolkit. Originally intended to be a commercial project, Vite+ combines Vite, Vitest, Oxlint, Oxfmt, Rolldown, and tsdown into a single, unified toolchain, and it's now in alpha.

IN BRIEF:

  • Sarah Gooding rounds up last week's TC39 meeting and the proposals that advanced there, including Temporal, Import Text, Error Stack Accessor, and Iterator Includes.

  • 😆 BigInt.PI = 3? Enjoy qntm's tongue-in-cheek proposal to add mathematical constants to BigInt.

  • Laurent Cazanove rounds up what was announced at last week's Vue.js Amsterdam conference, including Vue Router 5, Vite 8, and Void Cloud.

RELEASES:

  • Electron 41.0 – The cross-platform desktop app framework adds ASAR Integrity digest and MSIX auto-updating support, improves Wayland support, and updates to Chromium 146, Node v24.14.0, and V8 14.6.

  • Nitro v3 Beta – Extend your Vite app with a production-ready server, compatible with any runtime. Handy if you want to try building your own framework!

  • Vitest 4.1 – Next-gen testing framework, now supporting Vite 8.

  • Preact 10.29.0, Prisma 7.5.0, Babel 8.0 RC3, Vue 3.6.0 Beta 8

📖  Articles and Videos

Source Maps: Shipping Features Through Standards — Source maps are JSON files that provide debuggers and similar tools with a mapping between minified/transformed code and the original codebase. Jon gives us a tour and takes us behind the scenes of how the feature has progressed towards becoming a standard (ECMA-426).

Jon Kuperman (Bloomberg)

How we Rewrote 130K Lines from React to Svelte in Two Weeks — A common adage in recent months has been that the use of LLMs and coding agents could lock us into using only the most popular frameworks, but in reality they also make switching between frameworks easier than ever before.

Strawberry

Your Slowest Endpoint Is Probably an Analytics Query — TimescaleDB extends Postgres so analytics queries stay fast at scale. Hypertables, 95% compression, live data. Start for free.

Tiger Data (creators of TimescaleDB) sponsor

Best Practices for Svelte Developers — A brand new page in the Svelte docs that outlines some best practices for writing more robust Svelte apps.

Svelte Docs

An Empirical Study of Frontend Memory Leaks — Analysis of five hundred React, Vue and Angular apps for patterns that lead to memory leaks. Missing timer cleanups and event listener removals cause the majority of problems.

Ko-Hsin Liang

Rewriting a 12-Year-Old JavaScript Library in TypeScript — Specifically, the Machina finite state machine library.

Jim Cowart

📄 Lies I Was Told About Collaborative Editing: Why We Don't Use Yjs Alex Clemmer

▶️ Breaking and Securing OAuth 2.0 in Frontends Philippe De Ryck

📄 How I Added Bluesky Likes to My Astro Blog Luciano Mammino

📄 Why Node.js Needs a Virtual File System Matteo Collina

📄 Native JSON Modules Are Finally Real Matt Smith

🛠 Code & Tools

Nuxt 4.4: The Full-Stack Vue Framework — The full-stack Vue framework that includes routing (now powered by Vue Router v5), server-side rendering, and data fetching out of the box now adds custom useFetch/useAsyncData factories, typed layout props, build profiling, and more.

Daniel Roe and the Nuxt Team

Reveal.js 6.0: The HTML Presentation Framework — A long-standing way to bring elegant presentations to anyone with a browser. v6.0 has some breaking changes, switches to Vite, and introduces an official React wrapper.

Hakim El Hattab

40-60% of Your Mobile Builds Don't Need to Happen — Expo Workflows is mobile CICD that detects whether your changes touch native code and skips the builds you don't need.

Expo Workflows sponsor

RedwoodSDK 1.0 Released: The Cloudflare-Native React Framework — A server-first React framework, built as a Vite plugin, that integrates deeply with the Cloudflare platform (why?) and its provision of workers, databases (D1), durable objects, storage (R2), AI APIs, etc.

Peter Pistorius

  • Defuddle 0.14.0 – Get the main content of a page as Markdown. A modern implementation of the ideas behind Mozilla’s Readability.

  • Extension.js 3.9 – Framework for developing fast, unified cross-browser extensions with zero configuration.

  • React Native Sandbox 0.5 – Run multiple, isolated RN instances within an app.

  • XO 2.0 – Opinionated, configurable ESLint 10 wrapper with 'lots of goodies'.

  • Poku 4.1 – Cross-platform test runner that supports Node, Bun, and Deno.

  • sax js 1.6 – SAX-style streaming XML parser for Node and browsers.

  • 📺 YouTube.js 17.0 – JavaScript client for YouTube's private API.

  • Svelte SPA Router 5.0 – A router for Svelte 5 single-page apps.

  • 📃 PDFKit 0.18 – PDF generation library for Node and browsers.

  • Cypress ESLint Plugin v6.2.0 – ESLint plugin for Cypress tests.

📰 Classifieds

🌷 JSNation - Amsterdam & Online - This June, catch the latest trends in modern Web development from the people shaping its present & future.

📢  Elsewhere in the ecosystem

  • 📈 In The 49MB Web Page, Shubham Bose expresses surprise at finding that loading a single NY Times page results in 422 network requests and 49 megabytes of data transferred. He reflects on the problems that have led to this being a common experience on news sites.

  • Difftastic is a handy tool to diff code files based on syntax. It supports most popular languages including JavaScript and TypeScript.

  • VS Code 1.111 has been released. It's notable as being the first release in VS Code's new weekly stable release cadence.

  • Amazon S3 has introduced account regional namespaces for S3 buckets, a feature that will help prevent so-called 'bucketsquatting'.

  • 🎂 Feeling old yet? Sticking with S3, Amazon's Sébastien Stormacq reflects on the ubiquitous AWS S3 cloud storage system turning 20 years old.

】<表格边框= 0 cellpadding = 0 cellspacing = 0 对齐=“中心”边框=“0”>
<表格边框=0 cellpadding=0 cellspacing=0 边框=0 cellpadding=0 cellspacing=0>

#​777 — 2026 年 3 月 17 日

阅读网页

JavaScript 周刊

时间：9年历程在 JavaScript 中修复时间 — JavaScript 的日期/时间处理是出了名的混乱，而像 Moment.js 这样的库作为解决这个问题的方法。 2017 年，Moment.js 的维护者 Maggie Johnson-Pint 提出了Temporal API 来永久修复日期/时间处理，我们基本上做到了（支持不断增加，包括 Safari 和 N追赶颂歌）。

贾森·威廉姆斯（彭博社）

仍在手动编写测试吗？一丝不苟的人工智能就在这里 - Notion、Dropbox、Wiz 和 LaunchDarkly 现在使用他们离不开的测试范例。 Meticulous 由前 Palantir 工程师构建，可自动创建一套不断发展的 E2E UI 测试，无需开发人员付出任何努力即可提供详尽的覆盖范围。

细致赞助商

Vite 8.0 发布 — 流行构建工具的大型版本。为了实现平滑升级，幕后有很多东西：@vitejs/plugin-react v6 不再需要 Babel、Rolldown 取代 Rollup 和 esbuild、Wasm SSR 支持、浏览器控制台转发到终端以及强大的性能收益。

投票

💡 VoidZero 还开源其 Vite+ 工具包。 Vite+ 最初旨在成为一个商业项目，结合了 Vite、Vitest、Oxlint、Oxfmt、Rolldown 和tsdown 集成到一个统一的工具链中，现在处于 alpha 阶段。

<表格边框=0 cellpadding=0 cellspacing=0 边框=0 cellpadding=0 cellspacing=0>

简介：

  • Sarah Gooding 总结了上周的 TC39 会议以及会上提出的提案，包括 Temporal、导入文本、错误堆栈访问器和迭代器包含。

  • 😆BigInt.PI = 3？欣赏 qntm 半开玩笑的向 BigInt 添加数学常量的提议。

  • Laurent Cazanove 总结了上周Vue.js 阿姆斯特丹 会议，包括 Vue Router 5、Vite 8 和 Void Cloud。

发布：

  • Electron 41.0 – 跨平台桌面应用框架添加了 ASAR 完整性摘要和 MSIX 自动更新支持，改进了 Wayland 支持，并更新了 Chromium 146、Node v24.14.0、和 V8 14.6。

  • Nitro v3 Beta – 使用与任何运行时兼容的生产就绪服务器扩展您的 Vite 应用。如果您想尝试构建自己的框架，这会很方便！

  • Vitest 4.1 – 下一代测试框架，现已支持 Vite 8。

  • Preact 10.29.0，Prisma 7.5.0，Babel 8.0 RC3，Vue 3.6.0 Beta 8

📖 文章和视频

源地图：通过标准发布功能 — 源映射是 JSON 文件，提供调试器和类似工具，并在缩小/转换的代码与原始代码库之间进行映射。Jon 带领我们参观并带我们了解该功能如何在幕后发展成为标准 (ECMA-426)。

乔恩·库珀曼（彭博社）

我们如何在两周内将 13 万行代码从 React 重写为 Svelte - 近几个月来流行的一句格言是，使用 LLM 和编码代理可能会让我们只能使用最流行的框架，但实际上，它们也使在框架之间切换比以前更容易。

草莓

你的 Slowest 端点可能是一个分析查询 - TimescaleDB 扩展了 Postgres，因此分析查询在规模上保持快速。超级表、95% 压缩、实时数据。 免费开始。

Tiger Data（TimescaleDB 的创建者）赞助商

Svelte 开发者最佳实践 — 全新页面Svelte 文档概述了编写更强大的 Svelte 应用的一些最佳实践。

精简文档

前端内存泄漏的实证研究 — 500 例分析React、Vue 和 Angular 应用程序针对导致内存泄漏的模式。缺少计时器清理和事件侦听器删除会导致大多数问题。

梁科新

用 TypeScript 重写已有 12 年历史的 JavaScript 库 — 具体来说，Machina 有限状态机库。

吉姆·考沃特

📄关于协作编辑我被告知的谎言：为什么我们不使用 Yjs Alex Clemmer

▶️ 在前端破坏和保护 OAuth 2.0 Philippe De Ryck

📄我如何将 Bluesky 点赞添加到我的 Astro 博客 Luciano Mammino

📄为什么 Node.js 需要虚拟文件系统 Matteo Collina

📄原生 JSON 模块终于成为现实 Matt Smith

🛠 代码和工具

Nuxt 4.4：全栈 Vue 框架 — 全栈 Vue 框架包括路由（现在由 Vue Router v5 提供支持）、服务器端渲染和开箱即用的数据获取，现在添加了自定义 useFetch/useAsyncData 工厂、类型化布局属性、构建分析等。

丹尼尔·罗伊和 Nuxt 团队

<表边框=0 cellpadding=0 cellspacing=0 边框=0 cellpadding=0 cellspacing=0>

Reveal.js 6.0：HTML 演示框架 — 一种为使用浏览器的任何人提供优雅演示文稿的长期方式。v6.0 有一些重大更改，切换到 Vite，并引入了官方 React 包装器。

哈基姆·埃尔·哈塔布

40-60% 的移动版本不需要发生 - Expo Workflows 是移动 CICD，可检测您的更改是否触及本机代码并跳过您不需要的构建。

世博会工作流程赞助商

RedwoodSDK 1.0 发布：Cloudflare-Native React框架 - 一个服务器优先的 React 框架，作为 Vite 插件构建，与 Cloudflare 平台深度集成（为什么？）及其提供的工作人员、数据库 (D1)、持久对象、存储 (R2)、AI API 等。

彼得·皮斯托利斯

  • Defuddle 0.14.0 – 以 Markdown 形式获取页面的主要内容。 Mozilla 可读性背后理念的现代实现。

  • Extension.js 3.9 – 用于以零配置开发快速、统一的跨浏览器扩展程序的框架。

  • React Native Sandbox 0.5 – 在应用内运行多个独立的 RN 实例。

  • XO 2.0 – 固执己见、可配置的 ESLint 10 包装器，包含许多好东西s'。

  • Poku 4.1 – 支持 Node、Bun 和 Deno 的跨平台测试运行器。

  • sax js 1.6 – 适用于 Node 和浏览器的 SAX 风格流式 XML 解析器。

  • 📺 YouTube.js 17.0 – YouTube 私有 API 的 JavaScript 客户端。

  • Svelte SPA Router 5.0 – 适用于 Svelte 5 单页应用的路由器。

  • 📃 PDFKit 0.18 – 适用于 Node 和浏览器的 PDF 生成库。

  • 赛普拉斯 ESLint 插件 v6.2.0 – 用于 赛普拉斯测试。

<表格边框=0cellpadding=0 cellspacing=0 border=0 cellpadding=0 cellspacing=0>

📰 分类广告

🌷 JSNation - 阿姆斯特丹和在线 - 今年六月，从塑造现在和未来的人们那里了解现代 Web 开发的最新趋势。

📢 生态系统的其他地方

  • 📈 在 49MB 网页中，Shubham Bose 惊讶地发现加载单个《纽约时报》页面会导致 422 个网络请求和 49 MB 的数据传输。他反思了导致这种情况在新闻网站上常见的问题。

  • Difftastic 是一个根据语法区分代码文件的便捷工具。它支持最流行的语言，包括 JavaScript 和 TypeScript。

  • VS Code 1.111 已发布。值得注意的是，它是 VS Code 新的每周稳定发布节奏中的第一个版本。

  • Amazon S3 引入了为 S3 存储桶分配区域命名空间，该功能有助于防止所谓的“AWS S3 云存储系统已经 20 岁了。

item.title: 【TypeScript 6.0 RC and Solid 2.0 beta arrive】TypeScript 6.0 RC 和 Solid 2.0 beta 发布
item.description:
【

#​776 — March 10, 2026

Read on the Web

JavaScript Weekly

Solid v2.0.0 Beta: The <Suspense> is Over — After a long experimental phase, Solid 2.0’s first beta lands with first-class async support where computations can return Promises or async iterables, and the reactive graph suspends and resumes around them natively. <Suspense> is retired in favor of <Loading> for initial renders, and mutations get a first-class action() primitive with optimistic support. For existing users the breaking changes are substantial, but there’s a migration guide.

Ryan Carniato

💡 Ryan also had an AI write up the architectural case for Solid 2.0, framing fine-grained reactivity as the only sustainable model for an AI-agent world. He also did ▶️ a livestream where he tried to break Solid 2.0 by pushing against its limits.

The Most Loved JavaScript Course Year After Year — JavaScript: The Hard Parts is rated 4.92 on average by thousands of developers. Build real mental models for how JavaScript works, from execution context and closures to async behavior and modern language features.

Frontend Masters sponsor

TypeScript 6.0 Release Candidate — v6.0 is primarily a stepping stone to the eventual Go-powered native TypeScript 7.0 due later this year and all the necessary tsconfig.json changes will put you in a good position for the future. There are only a few small changes in the RC vs the recent beta.

Daniel Rosenwasser (Microsoft)

IN BRIEF:

  • TC39's 113th meeting has just started with the topic of taking the Temporal API to stage 4 high on the agenda.

  • 📊 Minification Benchmarks is a frequently updated comparison of different JavaScript minifiers. SWC is in the lead overall, but Minify and Oxc's minifier aren't far behind and are much faster.

  • 11ty (Eleventy) started life as a Node.js-powered static site generator, but now it's becoming Build Awesome, a project under the Font Awesome umbrella.

  • 🇫🇷 The dotJS conference is back in Paris this September 1. Its CFP is open until April 28.

RELEASES:

  • Node.js 25.8.0 (Current) – Adds a --permission-audit option to run Node's permission model in a warning-only mode.

  • Astro 6.0 – astro dev is now using Vite’s new Environment API so you can now run your exact prod runtime during dev. Also, a new Fonts API takes care of custom fonts.

  • Knockout 3.5.2 – The classic MVVM library gets its first update in six years!

  • ESLint v10.0.3 and ESLint v9.39.4

  • Ember 6.11, Ionic Framework 8.8, React Native 0.85 RC.0, pnpm v10.32.0, Recharts 3.8, Jest 30.3

📖  Articles and Videos

Seven Years to TypeScript: Migrating 11,000 Files at Patreon — The popular creator platform had a million lines of JavaScript on its hands, and while adopting TypeScript on new code was going well, converting all their code was a daunting task. This retrospective covers the tools and techniques involved.

Gavy Aggarwal (Patreon)

Building a Real-Time Todo App with Jazz and Vue 3 — Jazz is a distributed database with real-time syncing and local reactive JSON state.

Alexander Opalic

Next.js Source Maps: From Minified Chunks to Readable Stack Traces — Your stack traces shouldn't point to random chunk files. Learn how to wire up source maps so Sentry shows the code you actually wrote.

Sentry sponsor

A Tale of Stealing npm Publish Tokens by Opening a GitHub Issue — A repo had an AI-powered issue triage system that ran when any issue was opened, and the issue’s title was fed directly into the prompt… and that was just step one of the three-stage attack explained here.

Neciu Dan

Wikipedia Hit by Self-Propagating JavaScript Worm — A writeup of how a dormant script, accidentally triggered by a Wikimedia employee, exploited a shared global script and vandalized nearly 4,000 pages on Wikipedia’s Meta-Wiki.

Lawrence Abrams (Bleeping Computer)

📄 How to Decode a VIN in JavaScript – VINs (Vehicle Identification Numbers) are standardized codes assigned to various types of motor vehicle. Cardog

📄 Building Async Page Transitions in Vanilla JavaScript Valentin Mor

🛠 Code & Tools

RevoGrid: High-Performance Data Grid Component — A high-performance data grid control built for massive datasets. Integrates with Vue, Angular, React, Svelte, or can be used from vanilla JS. Live demo and GitHub repo.

Revolist OU

Clerk Core 3: Redesigned Hooks, Smaller Bundles, Agent-Ready APIs — Redesigned useSignIn, useSignUp, and useCheckout hooks, ~50KB bundle savings, and keyless mode extended to TanStack Start, Astro, and React Router.

Clerk sponsor

ArkType 2.2: Use Your TypeScript Types as Runtime Validators — A TypeScript-first validation library where types and validators are the same thing. Write a type once and it becomes both the static type and the runtime validator. In v2.2, type.fn brings runtime-validated functions, checking inputs and return values automatically.

ArkType

TinyBase 8.0: A Reactive Data Store for Local-First Apps — A reactive data store and sync engine that can be used as the entire backend for many types of app. It can stand alone or integrate with all sorts of things like cloud storage, client-side stores, SQL databases, etc. v8.0 adds a middleware feature and the ability to store objects and arrays in its ‘cells’.

James Pearce

📄 VMPrint: Pure JS Typesetting Engine for Perfect PDF Output — It’s common to defer to headless Chrome instances for print-to-PDF type work, but VMPrint “guarantees identical layout given identical input, down to the sub-point position of every glyph.” Here’s a sample PDF.

Cosmic Iron

  • SQLite JS 1.3 – Write custom SQLite functions in JavaScript.

  • Heapify 1.0 – Fast JavaScript priority queue, implemented using a binary heap.

  • 📺 OpenPlayer.js 3.0 – Modular, tree-shakeable HTML5 media player.

  • Emittery 2.0 – Sindre Sorhus's simple, modern async event emitter.

  • Svelte Sonner 1.1 – Toast notification component for Svelte apps.

  • 📄 EmbedPDF 2.8 – Framework-agnostic JavaScript PDF viewer.

  • Tabulator 6.4 – Interactive data tables for JavaScript apps.

  • 🕹️ melonJS 18.0 – Lightweight HTML5 2D game engine.

  • flatted 3.4 – Fast, minimal circular JSON parser.

  • Poku 4.0 – Cross-platform test runner.

📰 Classifieds

Flaky tests slowing down dev? Meticulous gives engineers confidence to ship faster by autonomously testing every edge case of your web app.

Trigger.dev handles queues, retries, and long-running tasks so you can build production-ready agents and TypeScript workflows reliably at scale.

📢  Elsewhere in the ecosystem

  • It's been eight years since we last mentioned JSLinux, Fabrice Bellard's JavaScript-powered Linux VM that runs in the browser. He's still working on it, and as of this week it supports x86_64, AVX-512 and APX.

    Head into a full x86_64 Alpine Linux environment, and start using Git, Node, Ruby, Perl, Python, and more, right away. Hacker News users discussed some use cases for it.

    The tech behind JSLinux is explained here with the biggest limitation being how its Internet connection works, going through a 40KB/s capped proxy.

  • Did you know you can use newline and tab characters in URLs in HTML and they'll be ignored?

  • How long does it take to compile Node.js on NVIDIA's tiny Jetson Nano device? About 27 hours.

  • How to recreate the Flappy Bird game with CSS and no JavaScript at all.

】<表格边框= 0 cellpadding = 0 cellspacing = 0 对齐=“中心”边框=“0”>
<表格边框=0 cellpadding=0 cellspacing=0 边框=0 cellpadding=0 cellspacing=0>

#​776 — 2026 年 3 月 10 日

阅读网页

JavaScript 周刊

<表格边框=0 单元格填充=0 cellspacing=0 border=0 cellpadding=0 cellspacing=0>

Solid v2.0.0 Beta： 已结束 — 经过漫长的实验阶段，Solid 2.0 的第一个测试版提供了一流的异步支持，其中计算可以返回 Promises 或异步迭代，并且反应式图本机围绕它们暂停和恢复。 已退役，取而代之的是用于初始渲染的 ，并且突变获得了具有乐观支持的一流 action() 原语。对于现有用户来说，重大变化是巨大的，但有迁移指南。

瑞安·卡尼亚托

💡 Ryan 还编写了一篇 AI Solid 2.0 的架构案例，将细粒度反应性框架作为 AI 代理世界唯一可持续的模型。他还进行了▶️直播，试图通过挑战 Solid 2.0 的极限来打破它。

年复一年最受欢迎的 JavaScript 课程 — JavaScript：最难的部分是数千名开发者的平均评分为 4.92。为 JavaScript 的工作原理构建真实的心理模型，从执行上下文和闭包到异步行为和现代语言功能。

前端大师赞助商

<表格边框=0 单元格填充=0 单元格间距=0 边框=0 单元格lpadd=0 cellspacing=0>

TypeScript 6.0 候选发布版 - v6.0 是主要是今年晚些时候发布的最终由 Go 驱动的原生 TypeScript 7.0 的垫脚石，所有必要的 tsconfig.json 更改将使您在未来处于有利位置。与最近的测试版相比，RC 版仅存在一些小变化。

丹尼尔·罗森瓦瑟（微软）

简介：

  • TC39 第 113 次会议刚刚开始，主题为 将 Temporal API 提升到第四阶段已成为议程的重点。

  • 📊 缩小基准是经常更新的不同 JavaScript 缩小器的比较。 SWC 总体上处于领先地位，但 Minify 和 Oxc 的 压缩器也不甘落后，而且速度更快。

  • 11ty (Eleventy) 最初是 Node.js 驱动的静态站点生成器，但现在是 成为 Font Awesome 旗下的项目。

  • 🇫🇷 dotJS 会议将于今年 9 月 1 日在巴黎回归。 其 CFP 开放至 4 月 28 日。

发布：

  • Node.js 25.8.0（当前） – 添加 --permission-audit 选项 以仅警告模式运行 Node 的权限模型。

  • <一href="https://javascriptweekly.com/link/181874/rss" style=" color: #3366aa; font-weight: 500 !important; ">Astro 6.0 – astro dev 现在使用 Vite 的新环境 API，因此您现在可以在开发期间运行准确的产品运行时。此外，新的 Fonts API 还负责处理自定义字体。

  • Knockout 3.5.2 – 经典 MVVM 库六年来首次更新！

  • ESLint v10.0.3 和 ESLint v9.39.4

  • Ember 6.11、Ionic Framework 8.8、React Native 0.85 RC.0、pnpm v10.32.0、Recharts 3.8、Jest 30.3

📖 文章和视频

使用 TypeScript 七年：迁移 11,000 个文件Patreon——流行的创作者平台手上有一百万行 JavaScript，虽然在新代码上采用 TypeScript 进展顺利，但转换他们的所有代码是一项艰巨的任务。本次回顾涵盖了所涉及的工具和技术。

加维·阿加瓦尔（Patreon）

使用 Jazz 和 Vue 3 构建实时 Todo 应用 — Jazz 是一个具有实时同步和本地反应式 JSON 状态的分布式数据库。

亚历山大·奥帕利克

Next.js 源映射：从缩小的块到可读的堆栈跟踪 - 您的堆栈跟踪不应指向随机块文件。了解如何连接源映射，以便 Sentry 显示您实际编写的代码。

哨兵 赞助商

通过打开 GitHub 问题窃取 npm 发布令牌的故事 - 存储库有一个人工智能驱动的问题分类系统，该系统在打开任何问题时都会运行，问题的标题会直接输入到提示中......这只是此处解释的三阶段攻击的第一步。

内丘丹

维基百科被自传播 JavaScript 蠕虫攻击 - 一篇关于维基媒体员工意外触发的休眠脚本如何利用共享全局脚本并破坏维基百科元维基上近 4,000 个页面的文章。

劳伦斯e Abrams（发出哔声的计算机）

📄 如何在 JavaScript 中解码 VIN – VIN (车辆识别号码）是分配给各种类型机动车辆的标准化代码。 卡狗

📄 在 Vanilla JavaScript 中构建异步页面转换 Valentin Mor

🛠 代码和工具

RevoGrid：高性能数据网格组件 — A为海量数据集构建的高性能数据网格控件。与 Vue、Angular、React、Svelte 集成，或者可以在 vanilla JS 中使用。 现场演示和GitHub 存储库

革命组织

Clerk Core 3：重新设计的 Hooks、更小的捆绑包、代理就绪 API - 重新设计的 useSignIn、useSignUp 和 useCheckout 挂钩、约 50KB 的捆绑包节省以及扩展到 TanStack Start、Astro 和 React Router 的无密钥模式。

文员赞助商

ArkType 2.2：使用 TypeScript 类型作为运行时验证器 - TypeScript 优先的验证库，其中类型和验证器是同一回事。编写一次类型，它既成为静态类型又成为运行时验证器。在 v2.2 中，type.fn 带来了运行时验证的函数，自动检查输入和返回值。

方舟型

TinyBase 8.0：本地优先应用程序的反应式数据存储 — 反应式数据存储和同步引擎，可用作多种类型应用程序的整个后端。它可以独立运行，也可以与各种事物集成，例如云存储、客户端存储、SQL 数据库等。v8.0 添加了中间件功能以及在其“单元”中存储对象和数组的能力。

詹姆斯·皮尔斯

📄 VMPrint：纯 JS 排版引擎或完美 PDF 输出 - 通常会采用无头 Chrome 实例来进行打印到 PDF 类型的工作，但 VMPrint“保证在给定相同输入的情况下，确保相同的布局，直至每个字形的子点位置。” 这里是一个示例PDF。

宇宙铁

  • SQLite JS 1.3 – 使用 JavaScript 编写自定义 SQLite 函数。

  • Heapify 1.0 – 快速 JavaScript 优先级队列，使用二进制堆实现。

  • 📺 OpenPlayer.js 3.0 – 模块化、tree-shakeable HTML5 媒体播放器。

  • Emittery 2.0 – Sindre Sorhus 的简单、现代的异步事件发射器。

  • Svelte Sonner 1.1 – Svelte 应用的 Toast 通知组件。

  • 📄 EmbedPDF 2.8 – 与框架无关的 JavaScript PDF 查看器。

  • Tabulator 6.4 – JavaScript 应用程序的交互式数据表。

  • 🕹️ melonJS 18.0 – 轻量级 HTML5 2D 游戏引擎。

  • flatted 3.4 – 快速、最小的循环 JSON 解析器。

  • Poku 4.0 – 跨平台测试运行器。

<表边框=0 cellpadding=0 cellspacing=0 边框=0 cellpadding=0 cellspacing=0>

📰 分类广告

不稳定的测试会减慢开发速度？ 细致让工程师有信心通过自主测试网络应用的每个边缘情况来更快地交付。

Trigger.dev 处理队列、重试和长时间运行的任务，以便您可以可靠地大规模构建可用于生产的代理和 TypeScript 工作流程。

📢 生态系统中的其他地方

  • 距离我们上次提到 JSLinux 已经过去八年了，Fabrice Bellard 的 JavaScript 支持的 Linux VM 在浏览器中运行。他仍在致力于此工作，截至本周，它支持 x86_64、AVX-512 和 APX。

    进入完整的 x86_64 Alpine Linux 环境，立即开始使用 Git、Node、Ruby、Perl、Python 等。 Hacker News 用户讨论了它的一些用例。

    此处解释了 JSLinux 背后的技术，最大的限制是其互联网连接的工作方式，需要通过 40KB/s 上限的代理。

  • 您是否知道您可以在 HTML 中在网址中使用换行符和制表符，并且它们会被忽略？

  • 在 NVIDIA 的微型 Jetson Nano 设备上编译 Node.js 需要多长时间？大约 27 小时。

  • 如何使用 CSS 重新创建 Flappy Bird 游戏，而无需任何 JavaScript。

item.title: 【External import maps, a big Bun release, and Node.js schedule changes】外部导入映射、大型 Bun 版本以及 Node.js 时间表更改
item.description:
【

#​775 — March 3, 2026

Read on the Web

JavaScript Weekly

Bun v1.3.10 Released: A Surprisingly Big Update — Bun’s REPL has been completely rewritten with many improvements (both practical and cosmetic), there's a --compile --target=browser option for building self-contained HTML files with all JS, CSS, and assets included (ideal for simple JS-powered single page apps), full support for TC39 stage 3 ES decorators, a faster event loop, barrel import optimization, and more.

Jarred Sumner

Still Writing Tests Manually? Meticulous AI Is Here — Notion, Dropbox, Wiz and LaunchDarkly now use a testing paradigm they can’t work without. Built by former Palantir engineers, Meticulous automatically creates an evolving suite of E2E UI tests, delivering exhaustive coverage with no developer effort.

Meticulous sponsor

External Import Maps, Today! — Several weeks ago Lea posted about web dependencies being broken, but now she has a solution. The core technique employed to emulate support for external import maps isn't obvious, despite being simple, but is already offered by JSPM 4.0.

Lea Verou

IN BRIEF:

  • The React Foundation has officially launched taking over ownership of React, React Native and JSX. It has a board of eight founding members (including Meta) with Seth Webster, former head of React at Meta, as exec director.

  • It's not formal yet, but this preview post reveals how Node.js's release schedule is changing later this year (one major release per year, every release to be LTS, with no more odd/even distinction).

  • 📢 Monthly roundups have landed from Svelte, ViteLand / VoidZero, and Astro.

  • 🔒 The Angular team explains two recently patched vulnerabilities in Angular.

  • The Navigation API is now Baseline Newly Available across all major browsers.

RELEASES:

  • Deno 2.7 – The alternative runtime stabilizes Temporal API support, supports Windows on ARM, adds package.json overrides support, and more.

  • Expo SDK 55 – The popular React Native framework/toolchain.

  • Shiki 4.0 – TextMate grammar powered, VS Code-like syntax highlighter.

  • Angular 21.2, Mediabunny 1.35, Neo.mjs 12.0

📖  Articles and Videos

Making WebAssembly a First-Class Citizen on the Web — WASM has come a long way but remains tricky to work with on the Web, with even performing a console.log requiring a lot of glue code. Ryan makes the case that the WebAssembly Component Model could change this by letting modules bind directly to browser APIs, load directly from script tags, and more.

Ryan Hunt

We Deserve a Better Streams API for JavaScript — “I’m publishing this to start a conversation,” says James who shows off an alternative approach to Web streams that works around the current standard’s “fundamental usability and performance issues.” The end results and James' extensive experience in this area make for a compelling argument.

James M Snell

npx workos: An AI Agent That Writes Auth Directly Into Your Codebase — Reads your project, detects your framework, writes the integration, then typechecks and fixes its own build errors.

WorkOS sponsor

The Illusion of JavaScript-Powered 'DRM' — An explanation of why building a DRM/copy protection system purely in JavaScript (rather than EME-based approaches) is ultimately just “sophisticated friction”, at best, and uses a tale of breaking a (NSFW) platform’s protection to make the point.

Ahmed Arat

How Cloudflare Rebuilt Next.js with AI in a Week — vinext is an experimental, Vite-based reimplementation of Next.js’s API surface, letting existing apps run in more environments, though with some tradeoffs.

Steve Faulkner (Cloudflare)

Using Val Town to Get Me to the Movies — Val Town is a fantastic platform for quickly writing and deploying JavaScript-powered services. Like this one!

Raymond Camden

📄 Sticky Grid Scroll: Building a Scroll-Driven Animated Grid – I’m not a huge fan of scroll-driven effects, but this one does look neat. Theo Plawinski

📄 From instanceof to Error.isError for Safer Error Checking Matt Smith

📄 Proxying Fetch Requests in Server-Side JavaScript Nicholas C. Zakas

▶️ Why I Chose Electron Over Native (And I’d Do It Again) Syntax Podcast

📄 Using React Native to Create Meta Quest VR Apps Chludziński, Jaworski, and Leyendecker

🛠 Code & Tools

txiki.js: A Small, Powerful JavaScript Runtime — Stands on the shoulders of QuickJS-ng and libuv and aims to support the latest ECMAScript features while being WinterTC compliant. GitHub repo.

Saúl Ibarra Corretgé

numpy-ts: A NumPy Implementation for TypeScript — A recreation of NumPy, a fundamental piece of the Python scientific computing ecosystem, that works in the browser, Node, Bun, and Deno. 94% of NumPy’s API is covered so far and there’s an online playground to give it a try.

Nicolas Dupont

Ship Real-Time Features Without Real-Time Complexity — TimescaleDB extends Postgres: hypertables, 95% compression, continuous aggregates. Run analytics on live data. Try free.

Tiger Data (creators of TimescaleDB) sponsor

Yoopta Editor 6.0: A Headless Rich Text Editor for React — MIT-licensed library for creating block-based, Notion-style rich text editing experiences. It’s headless at heart, but comes with a variety of UI components to get started fast. The playground offers a live example.

Akhmed Ibragimov

AdonisJS v7 Released: 'Batteries-Included' Node.js Framework — A popular framework that includes auth, ORM, queues, testing, etc. With v7 comes an all new web site, OpenTelemetry integration, new starter kits to rapidly build new apps, and more.

Harminder Virk

🎨 Color Thief 3.0: Grab Color Palettes from Images — Given an image, this uses canvas to return a list of the dominant colors. Works in browsers or Node. Now with OKLCH support, Web Worker offloading, ‘live extraction’ for video, canvas and image elements, and more. GitHub repo.

Lokesh Dhakar

📊 ng2-charts: Chart.js-Based Charting Library for Angular — Now with Angular 20 support.

Valor Labs

vue-superselect: A Headless Select/Combobox for Vue 3

Nemanja Malesija

  • 📄 React PDF 10.4 – Display PDFs in React apps. v10.4 adds the ability to override colors used in rendering.

  • 🕹️ JSNES 2.0 – JavaScript NES emulator for browsers and Node. (Demo.)

  • Milkdown 7.19 – Plugin-driven WYSIWYG markdown editor framework.

  • Peggy 5.1 – Simple parser generator.

📢  Elsewhere in the ecosystem

  • 🎉 Three weeks ago we featured npmx.dev, a new, fast way to browse and search the official npm registry. Things have got more serious this week with a full announcement post about the site's alpha release, coupled with a flurry of enthusiastic blog posts from around the community celebrating the project. I can't remember the last time a JavaScript project attracted so many blog posts at the same time.

  • Locutus is a curious project that offers TypeScript ports of standard libraries from fifteen other programming languages (e.g. PHP, Go, Python, Ruby).

  • The results of the State of React Native 2025 survey have been released by Software Mansion and Devographics.

  • Detailed notes for performing a TypeScript 5.x to 6.0 migration. The author suggests it might be handy to feed to an AI agent of your choice.

  • An interactive version of the famous xkcd comic about single-person dependencies, courtesy of p5.js.

  • The Drizzle ORM team has joined PlanetScale.

  • A list of little, fun programming languages.

#​775 — 2026 年 3 月 3 日

阅读网页

JavaScript 周刊

Bun v1.3.10 发布：A令人惊讶的大更新 - Bun 的 REPL 已完全重写，并进行了许多改进（实用和装饰），有一个 --compile --target=browser 选项，用于构建包含所有 JS、CSS 和资源的独立 HTML 文件（非常适合简单的 JS 驱动的单页应用程序），完全支持 TC39 第 3 阶段 ES 装饰器、更快的事件循环、桶式导入优化等等。

贾里德·萨姆纳

还在手动编写测试吗？Meticulous AI 来了 - Notion、Dropbox、Wiz 和 LaunchDarkly 现在使用他们离不开的测试范例。Meticulous 由前 Palantir 工程师构建，可自动创建一套不断发展的 E2E UI 测试，无需开发人员付出任何努力即可提供详尽的覆盖范围。

一丝不苟赞助商

今天就外部导入地图！ — 几周前 Lea 发布了有关 网络依赖关系被破坏，但现在她有了一个解决方案。用于模拟对外部导入映射的支持的核心技术虽然简单，但并不明显，但已经由 JSPM 4.0 提供。

莉亚维罗

简介：

  • React 基金会已正式启动，接管 React、React Native 和 JSX 的所有权。该基金会拥有由 8 名创始成员（包括 Meta）组成的董事会，Meta 的 React 前负责人 Seth Webster 担任执行董事。

  • 尚未正式，但这篇预览文章揭示了今年晚些时候 Node.js 的发布时间表如何变化（一个主要的每年发布一次，每个版本都是 LTS，不再有奇数/偶数区别）。

  • 📢 每月综述已从 Svelte、ViteLand / VoidZero，以及Astro。

  • 🔒 Angular 团队解释了 Angular 中最近修补的两个漏洞。

  • Navigation API 现已在所有主要浏览器上全新推出。

发布：

  • Deno 2.7 – 替代运行时稳定了 Temporal API 支持，支持 ARM 上的 Windows，添加了 package.json overrides 支持等等。

  • Expo SDK 55 – 流行的 React Native 框架/工具链。

  • Shiki 4.0 – TextMate 语法支持、类似 VS Code 的语法荧光笔。

  • Angular 21.2，Mediabunny 1.35，Neo.mjs 12.0

📖 文章和视频

让 WebAssembly 成为 Web 上的一等公民 - WASM 已经取得了很大的进步，但在 Web 上使用仍然很棘手，甚至执行 console.log 也需要大量的粘合代码。Ryan 认为 WebAssembly 组件模型可以通过让模块直接绑定到浏览器 API、直接从 script 标签加载等来改变这一点。

瑞安·亨特

我们值得为 JavaScript 提供更好的 Streams API - James 说道，“我发布此内容是为了开始一场对话”，他展示了一种解决当前标准的“基本可用性和性能问题”的 Web 流替代方法。最终结果和 James 在该领域的丰富经验构成了令人信服的论据。

詹姆斯·M·斯内尔

npx workos: 直接将身份验证写入代码库的 AI 代理 — 读取您的项目、检测您的框架、编写集成，然后进行类型检查并修复其自己的构建错误。

WorkOS 赞助商

EME 的方法）最终充其量只是“复杂的摩擦”，并使用了一个打破(NSFW) 平台的保护足以说明这一点。

艾哈迈德·阿拉特

Cloudflare 如何在一周内使用 AI 重建 Next.js — vinext 是 Next.js API 表面的一个实验性的、基于 Vite 的重新实现，让现有应用程序可以在更多环境中运行，尽管 一些权衡。

史蒂夫·福克纳（Cloudflare）

使用瓦尔镇带我去看电影 — Val Town 是一个用于快速编写和部署 JavaScript 驱动的服务的绝佳平台。就像这个！

雷蒙德·卡姆登

txiki.js：一个小而强大的 JavaScript 运行时 — 立场在 QuickJS-ng 和 libuv 的基础上，旨在支持最新的 ECMAScript 功能，同时兼容 WinterTC 。 GitHub 存储库。

萨乌尔·伊瓦拉·科雷杰

在没有实时复杂性的情况下提供实时功能 — TimescaleDB扩展 Postgres：超表、95% 压缩、连续聚合。对实时数据进行分析。 免费试用。

Tiger Data（TimescaleDB 的创建者）赞助商

numpy-ts：TypeScript 的 NumPy 实现 — A重建 NumPy，它是 Python 科学计算生态系统的基本组成部分，可在浏览器、Node、Bun 和 Deno 中运行。到目前为止，NumPy 的 API 已涵盖 94%，并且有在线游乐场供您尝试。

尼古拉斯·杜邦

Yoopta Editor 6.0：React 无头富文本编辑器 —麻省理工学院许可的库，用于创建基于块的、Notion 风格的富文本编辑体验。它本质上是无头的，但配备了各种 UI 组件，可以快速入门。 游乐场提供了一个实例。

艾哈迈德·易卜拉吉莫夫

哈米德·维克

📢 生态系统中的其他地方

  • 🎉 三周前，我们推荐了npmx.dev，一种新的、快速的方式来浏览和搜索官方 npm 注册表。本周 关于该网站 alpha 版本的完整公告帖子，以及 混乱字体粗细：500！重要； ">热情 博客 来自 社区庆祝该项目。我不记得上次一个 JavaScript 项目同时吸引如此多的博客文章是什么时候了。

  • Locutus 是一个奇怪的项目，它提供来自 15 种其他编程语言（例如 PHP、Go、Python、Ruby）的标准库的 TypeScript 端口。

  • Software Mansion 和 Devgraphics 发布了 React Native 2025 现状调查的结果。

  • 执行 TypeScript 5.x 到 6.0 迁移的详细说明。 作者建议将其提供给您选择的 AI 代理可能会很方便。

  • 关于单人依赖性的著名 xkcd 漫画，由 p5.js。

  • Drizzle ORM 团队有 加入 PlanetScale。

  • 一系列小而有趣的编程语言。
